decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to utilize the combo of Painter's Servant and Grindstone to mill the opponent's entire deck in one turn. By using cards like Urza's Tower, Grim Monolith, and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck can generate extensive mana to set up the combo quickly. The deck also includes cards like The One Ring and Urza's Saga for additional utility and protection. With a focus on speed and efficiency, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and win the game before they have a chance to react.

This UWx control deck focuses on disruption and card advantage through Counterspells, Removal, and Cantrips. The goal is to control the board using cards like Swords to Plowshares and Force of Will while generating card advantage with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Quantum Riddler. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Stifle and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By efficiently managing resources and controlling the pace of the game, this deck aims to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory through attrition and careful decision-making.

The main focus of this deck is to create a fast and aggressive strategy using a combination of powerful creatures and disruptive spells. It aims to control the board with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize while putting pressure on the opponent with creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls. The deck also utilizes cards like Goblin Bombardment for additional reach and removal options. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The focus of this deck is to quickly get powerful creatures onto the battlefield through the use of cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By using Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, the player can overwhelm their opponent with massive threats. Cards like Brainstorm and Ponder help to dig for combo pieces, while counterspells like Force of Will and disruptive cards like Flusterstorm help to protect the combo. With the ability to cheat out expensive creatures early in the game, this deck aims to win quickly before the opponent has a chance to respond.

The deck focuses on quickly generating mana through spells like Dark Ritual and Lion's Eye Diamond to storm off and cast a lethal Tendrils of Agony. It uses cards like Burning Wish to access the sideboard for additional combo pieces or answers, while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Silence. The deck can also utilize cards like Gaea's Will and Echo of Eons to refill its hand and continue its combo. The goal is to quickly assemble a winning combination of spells and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with powerful Eldrazi creatures and disrupt their game plan by utilizing cards like Chalice of the Void and Thought-Knot Seer. The deck focuses on fast mana acceleration with cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal to quickly deploy threats like Eldrazi Linebreaker and Glaring Fleshraker. The goal is to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain control with cards like Wasteland and Kozilek's Command while utilizing Eldrazi Temple and Cavern of Souls to ensure your creatures can't be easily countered.

The focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing lands as both a resource and a means to disrupt the opponent. The key strategy involves using cards like Life from the Loam, Exploration, and Crop Rotation to quickly develop a powerful land base that can lock down the opponent's options. This is supported by disruptive elements like Sphere of Resistance and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale to slow down the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes a combo finish with Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a powerful 20/20 creature.

The main idea behind this deck is to use a combination of fast mana acceleration cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, along with creatures like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer to quickly mill through your entire library. By doing so, you can trigger abilities like Narcomoeba and Bridge from Below, and ultimately win the game with Thassa's Oracle or Pact of Negation. The deck aims to quickly and efficiently combo off without relying on traditional win conditions, overwhelming your opponent with a barrage of spells and graveyard interactions.

The main concept of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly deploy powerful Eldrazi creatures onto the battlefield and disrupt your opponent's game plan with Chalice of the Void and Kozilek's Command. By utilizing cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal, you can accelerate your mana production and overwhelm your opponent with hard-hitting threats like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher. The deck also utilizes land destruction with Wasteland and Wastescape Battlemage to further disrupt your opponent's resources while leveraging the Eldrazi synergies provided by cards like Eye of Ugin and Eldrazi Temple.

This deck excels at disrupting the opponent's resources and controlling the board through spells like Smallpox and Thoughtseize. It also utilizes cards like Life from the Loam and Urza's Saga to generate value and create advantageous positions. The inclusion of Grist, the Hunger Tide and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis provide additional threats and win conditions. The deck aims to lock down the opponent's options while establishing its own game plan, ultimately outlasting opponents through attrition.

The main concept of this deck is to heavily control the game using a combination of removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize, along with counterspells like Force of Will. The deck also utilizes strong planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to generate card advantage and control the board. Additionally, the inclusion of creatures like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provide additional disruption for the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outcontrol the opponent in order to secure victory.

The deck focuses on disrupting opponents' strategies with a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction. It also utilizes card advantage and recursion with cards like Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath and Life from the Loam. The deck aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent through resource management and versatile spells. The inclusion of powerful finishers like Murktide Regent and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student ensures the deck can close out the game once it gains control. The deck also features some unique and versatile cards like Witherbloom Command and Quantum Riddler to further enhance its control strategy.

The deck revolves around using various artifacts and mana ramp to quickly assemble a powerful combo involving Mystic Forge and other artifacts like Voltaic Key, Glaring Fleshraker, and The One Ring. By generating mana efficiently with cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's Tower, and utilizing cards like Planar Nexus and Karn, the Great Creator to tutor for combo pieces, the deck aims to create a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of card advantage and threats.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifact cards and control elements to create a prison-like setup for the opponent. It aims to establish board control with cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms, Karn, the Great Creator, and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, while also locking down the opponent's options with cards such as Manifold Key, Pithing Needle, and Portable Hole. By leveraging powerful artifacts like The One Ring, Urza's Tower, and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent while eventually closing out the game with cards like Walking Ballista and Kozilek's Command.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly assemble the necessary combo pieces to cheat out powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By utilizing cards like Ponder, Brainstorm, and Stock Up to dig through the deck and find the combo pieces, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with massive threats while also having counterspells like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect the combo. The deck also includes mana acceleration with Lotus Petal and City of Traitors to power out the combo pieces faster.
